description: Expanded real eval — function lookup + conceptual queries against cqs itself

function_lookup.query: find functions with similar implementations by embedding distance
determine if a function is reachable from any test
list all functions that nobody calls
detect which files changed since the index was last built
run a full codebase health assessment
convert an ePub document to indexable markdown
convert a CHM help archive to markdown text
strip noise tags and boilerplate from converted markdown
suggest where in the codebase a new feature should be placed
create an implementation plan from a task description
guided onboarding tour through unfamiliar code
BFS expansion of search results through call graph neighbors
compute a risk score for each function based on callers and coverage
find functions that share callers or callees with a target
map git diff hunks to the functions they modify
review uncommitted changes with risk scoring
run CI gating analysis on a pull request diff
detect semantic drift between two index snapshots
parse a unified diff into hunks and file paths
enumerate all source files matching language filters
detect file format from extension and content
batch embed multiple documents in a single pass
count tokens in a text string using the model tokenizer
open a store in read-only mode for search queries
delete index entries for files that were removed from disk
clean up orphaned LLM summaries that no longer match any chunk
remove stale call graph edges after file reparse
get callers of a function with call site context
get all callees of a function with their signatures
build the full bidirectional call graph from the store
find what types a function uses in its signature and body
find all functions that reference a given type
generate training data pairs from git history
submit a batch of functions to Claude API for LLM summaries
generate HyDE predicted search queries for functions
write doc comments back to source files
check if a function needs a doc comment generated
resolve which ONNX model to use from presets and env vars
warm up the embedding model by running a dummy inference
load reference indexes from project configuration
validate a reference index name for safe filesystem use
search a reference index by function name
store and retrieve audit mode state across sessions
suggest new notes based on codebase patterns
check if stored notes reference files that still exist
find hotspot functions with the most callers
determine if a chunk represents callable code vs documentation
set up signal handler for graceful interrupt during indexing
convert impact analysis results to mermaid diagram format
extract body keywords from function source for search boosting

conceptual.query: how does the search pipeline combine keyword and vector results
what happens when you index a file for the first time
how does the enrichment pipeline transform code before embedding
what is the complete flow for analyzing the impact of a code change
how does cqs handle multiple projects with separate indexes
what code handles converting documents to indexable text
how does the call graph get built during indexing
what determines which embedding model is used
how does the file watcher detect and process changes
what is the scoring formula for search result ranking
how do notes affect search result ordering
what happens during schema migration between versions
how does the HNSW index persist to disk with integrity checks
what code handles the scout multi-step investigation
how does the gather command expand search results through the call graph
what is the flow for generating LLM summaries of functions
how does cqs pack search results into a token budget
what code parses tree-sitter output into chunks for each language
how does the batch pipeline handle multi-command sessions
what determines the natural language description template for a chunk
how does cqs detect and handle GPU vs CPU execution
what code manages the type graph and type edge relationships
how does diff-aware impact analysis work for pull requests
what is the complete planning workflow from task description to implementation brief
how does cqs handle windowing for long functions that exceed model context
what code normalizes file paths for cross-platform consistency
how does the FTS5 query expansion handle synonym groups
what happens when you search across multiple reference indexes
how does cqs identify which tests exercise a given function
what code handles tokenizing identifiers into searchable words
how does the onboarding tour guide users through unfamiliar code
what determines the risk level of a function in impact analysis
how does cqs reconstruct a source file from stored chunks
what code handles the training data extraction pipeline
how does related function discovery work through co-occurrence
what is the flow for generating and writing doc comments to source
how does cqs handle concurrent access to the index database
what code manages embedding storage and retrieval in SQLite
how does the brief command summarize a file with caller and test counts
what happens when the semantic diff compares two index snapshots
